---
title: "Blog about research writing"
listing:
    id: id_Blog1
    contents: "Blogs1/b*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date"
    max-items: 15
    image-align: left
    image-placeholder: "Figures/noFigureMessage.jpg"
    date-format: long
    categories: true
    sort-ui: [title, date]
---
Here's a list of short articles, tutorials and guides related to research writing.

::: {#id_Blog1}
:::
